headline: Novella Insurance Agency LLC announced that it has received $21 million in funding from a group of investors
summary: Novella Insurance Agency LLC announced that it has raised $21 million in a round of funding led by new investor, Brewer Lane Management LLC, on May 14, 2026. The transaction included participation...
